objectives.label: Compliance
objectives.description: Ensure procurements satisfy mandatory legal, policy, and governance controls.

objectives.label: Consistency
objectives.description: Apply procurement policy in a repeatable and traceable way across agencies and categories.

objectives.label: Value for Money
objectives.description: Shape governance and market decisions toward stronger commercial outcomes rather than rote compliance.

objectives.label: Risk Reduction
objectives.description: Reduce legal, delivery, probity, privacy, and assurance risk through targeted controls.

objectives.label: Process Control
objectives.description: Modify workflow, evidence, and sequencing where policy requires stronger governance discipline.

objectives.label: Assurance
objectives.description: Add approvals, checks, and oversight where the procurement risk profile justifies them.

objectives.label: Accountability
objectives.description: Make the reasoning, ownership, and promotion of policy logic reviewable and auditable.

objectives.label: Readiness
objectives.description: Ensure prerequisite actions and evidence are completed before a procurement progresses.
